title: Design Coffee Oracle upload interface (layout + theme)
acceptance_criteria: Design iteration doc in frontend/design_iterations/ outlines layout + theme decisions referencing CoffeeOracle goals
Next.js page renders hero copy, form shell, and results placeholder components with Tailwind/Flowbite styling
Form includes semantic labels, validation copy, and creativity slider 0-10 mirroring backend contract
UI uses accessible color contrast, keyboard focus treatment, and placeholder state for streaming output
